allow: Bash(php -r '$db = new mysqli\(""localhost"", ""root"", """", ""propiedad_horizontal""\); $tables = [""evaluacion_inicial_sst"", ""tbl_pta_cliente"", ""tbl_cronog_capacitacion"", ""tbl_pendientes""]; foreach \($tables as $t\) { echo ""\\n=== $t ===\\n""; $r = $db->query\(""SHOW COLUMNS FROM $t""\); if \($r\) { while \($row = $r->fetch_assoc\(\)\) { echo $row[""Field""] . "" | "" . $row[""Type""] . "" | "" . $row[""Null""] . ""\\n""; } } else { echo ""TABLE NOT FOUND\\n""; } }')

Bash(php -r '$db = new mysqli\(""localhost"", ""root"", """", ""propiedad_horizontal""\); $r = $db->query\(""SELECT YEAR\(created_at\) as anio, COUNT\(*\) as total FROM evaluacion_inicial_sst GROUP BY YEAR\(created_at\) ORDER BY anio""\); while \($row = $r->fetch_assoc\(\)\) { echo $row[""anio""] . "": "" . $row[""total""] . "" registros\\n""; }')

Bash(php -r '$db = new mysqli\(""localhost"", ""root"", """", ""propiedad_horizontal""\); $r = $db->query\(""SELECT YEAR\(created_at\) as anio, COUNT\(*\) as total FROM tbl_pta_cliente GROUP BY YEAR\(created_at\) ORDER BY anio""\); while \($row = $r->fetch_assoc\(\)\) { echo $row[""anio""] . "": "" . $row[""total""] . "" registros\\n""; } echo ""\\n--- PTA con fecha_cierre ---\\n""; $r = $db->query\(""SELECT YEAR\(fecha_cierre\) as anio, COUNT\(*\) as total FROM tbl_pta_cliente WHERE fecha_cierre IS NOT NULL GROUP BY YEAR\(fecha_cierre\) ORDER BY anio""\); while \($row = $r->fetch_assoc\(\)\) { echo $row[""anio""] . "": "" . $row[""total""] . "" registros\\n""; }')
